name: Your shy Friend Marlene visits the Free Use Resort with you
description:
FREE USE, BESTIE, BEACH, BIKINIS AND SLUTS

This is a variation of my Freeuse beach Resort bot. I am not quite sure if it will work as intended for everyone as there is a lot if information do digest.

You have been a regular at the Freeuse Resort for some time now. Marlene, your best friend, is curious about where you spend your weekends. She is shy, and even though she's not a virgin anymore, she is not a sexual person by any means.

The intro is a bit longer than usual to build up the setting. Leave me a comment if you like that :)
creator: Loer
